case_title: 1635 -10TH AVENUE VENTURE ASSOCIATES, LLC. VS. PETER DELAPPE

MOTION TO TRANSFER FILED BY PETER DELAPPE IS GRANTED. AT THE DEFENDANT'S REQUEST, THIS MATTER IS ORDERED TRANSFERRED TO THE SUPERIOR COURT - UNLIMITED JURISDICTION. THE PLAINTIFF APPEARS; THE DEFENDANT APPEARS; JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK MARJORIE L. MANZELLA; NOT REPORTED (DEPT. 506).

THE PLAINTIFF APPEARS; THE DEFENDANT APPEARS; AT THE DEFENDANT'S REQUEST, THE MATTER IS ORDERED TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT--UNLIMITED JURISDICTION. JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK MARJORIE L. MANZELLA; NOT REPORTED (DEPT. 506).
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
